remarks: "Two attached single-family homes. Front house has 4 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. Back house has large rooms, 3 bedrooms, and 3 full bathrooms. Both units have dishwashers, a newer roof, finished basements, and washer/dryer included. Great parking with 3 driveway spots and 3 rear spaces. Conveniently located near Interstate I-95, Metro-North Railroad, and Westchester Airport for effortless commuting. Property needs updates. Buyers and agents to conduct own diligence, Sold as is."
